case.title: HEIDER, ADMINISTRATOR v. MICHIGAN SUGAR CO.

opinion.h1: HEIDER, ADMINISTRATOR v. MICHIGAN SUGAR CO., 385 U.S. 362 (1966)
opinion.h4: HEIDER, ADMINISTRATOR v. MICHIGAN SUGAR CO. CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF MICHIGAN. No. 48. Argued December 8, 1966. Decided December 12, 1966.
opinion.p: Gregory M. Pillon argued the cause for petitioner. With him on the brief was Thomas C. Mayer.
Harry M. Plotkin argued the cause for respondent. With him on the brief was Carl H. Smith.
The writ is dismissed as improvidently granted.
